title: Old World Charm in Sag Harbor Village
body: WebID 1086492 Romantic farmhouse offering 4 beds and 2 bathrooms, in the historic district of Sag Harbor Village lets you enjoy and experience old world charm without sacrificing state of the art day ammenities. Come and enjoy the relaxation on the wrap-around porch or in the lovely garden on the wisteria covered dining terrace.The home/office and additional artist studio/barn provide extra space. The house has been featured in elle decor for it's light and spacious look. Located in the middle of Sag Harbor Village with its diverse restaurants, shops ,art galleries and bay beaches as well as the Jitney, you have everything at your finger tips and yet once out back in the lovely gardens you can relax and enjoy the sounds of nature..... 15 Grand St Sag Harbor  Master Bedroom on 1st Floor Room for a Pool Heat None / Mainland Family Room/Den Bathroom on 1st Floor Great Room Workshop OHW Linens Basement Breakfast nook  James Giugliano tel: 631.287.9260x4381 mobile: 631.456.XXXX XXXX@nestseekers.com

title: One BR Apartment - Situated on a tranquil in Prime.
body: This spacious one beds, 1 baths unit is full of charm and character. Filled with an abundance of natural light this tastefully updated unit has no walls, creating a tranquil and private space. Upgrades include new flooring throughout, air conditioned unit in Living Room, top of the line kitchen appliances including dishwasher, stove, refrigerator, Quartz counters and large breakfast nook. The spare room off the hallway could easily serve as an office nook, pantry or storage area. Large spacious closets and shelving can be found throughout and the recently updated bathroom offers a wonderfully tiled shower and bathtub. Community washer & dryer and 1 assigned, uncovered parking space included. Close to shopping, restaurants and markets.
